objective: Implement five discrete themes (system, light, stone, twilight, dark) as groups of CSS variables in static/styles/tokens.css (or equivalent), controlled by the Slider in src/routes/+layout.svelte. First option 'system' must match current behavior: theme follows browser prefers-color-scheme. Other options apply explicit variable sets on commit. Light and dark explicit palettes must preserve current :root and @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) color definitions. Stone and twilight colors are product-tunable. App colors apply each time the slider value is committed (onValueCommit). Fix clampThemeIndex to cover all five indices.

completed_stages.summary: Plan and acceptance criteria for five-theme CSS variable groups, system vs explicit precedence, layout Slider wiring.
tokens.css theme groups, theme.ts helpers, +layout Slider applyTheme on commit.
Vitest unit tests for clampThemeIndex and applyTheme; coverage map and commands documented.
PASS_WITH_NOTES: ACs met with review evidence; Playwright prerequisite for full test run noted.
